Hey, welcome back. Okay, we're gonna build those level three campaigns in just a minute and we're gonna use newer bidding strategies when we do so we're gonna put a slight twist on it But before we do I want to play a little game of should we freak out? All right, so here we are we're inside of my Facebook account and I'm filming this for you at 1213 on September 3rd and these are all of the campaigns not just the ones that I've created during this class But all of the campaigns that are selling that four-course bundle. All right, I've spent $512 and I've made $143 we are losing money today. The question is gotta hit refresh first just to make sure okay, the question is should we Freak out and the answer is in the numbers Okay, so let's take a look and just diagnose everything and see if we should be super concerned You know some days are better than others as we've talked about with Facebook. You go up you go down up down You have to look at an average. All right, so let's see if we need to freak out about anything. Okay. Well, first of all What do we need to look for our cost per click? Okay? And I'm just going to look at all these campaigns as a whole because there's so many of them None of them have spent a significant amount of money except this guy This is going to everybody globally my cost per click is super low here I'm not really going to worry about it. Okay as a general rule My cost per click is like okay, but some of these campaigns. It's ridiculously high What should we do? Should we turn the campaigns off? Should we go bonkers? Should we you know pull our hair? Nash our teeth Yeah, no, I don't think so. Here's why okay. Look at this number. We've had 312 unique visitors now click funnels Of course is telling us a different number. I think it's because they use different time zones than facebook even though they say You know, you can sync it up to the same time zone. It's always different for me But let's just go with what facebook said. All right, so 300 something 312 visitors 22 sales Okay, not too shabby. You know the conversion rates. Okay. The page isn't broken Everything's going all right. So how come we haven't made any money? Well, are we paying too much per customer? Let's have a look All right. So we've spent in total $512 and we've got 22 actually 24 customers. So let me pull out the old phone Do some handy math here and let's figure it out 512 divided by 24 customers is we're paying $21 and 33 cents per customer That's within our acceptable range. Everything's cool in that regard. Nothing to really freak out about But how come we haven't made any money? Well, the answer is pretty simple. We've had 22 customers That's great in order for this campaign to be profitable immediately on the front end People need to take one click up sells and order bumps and so far today Nobody's really taken anything. Does that mean the funnel's broken? No, right? It doesn't now How can I say that because we look at the data? Okay, so let's just go and just look, you know Just to really drive this point home. Let's look at the look at my average card value $6.00 today is terrible Let's look at the overall Value over the past 30 days from august 3rd to september 3rd Generally speaking, these are Our conversion rates. So this order bump usually gets 11 percent of buyers. This one usually gets 8.59 percent of buyers, etc Etc. All right, it's off today But it's not enough data because we've only had 24 customers in total It's not enough data for us to really conclude that anything is wrong The reason i'm showing you this is because some days stuff will not work the way you want it to and if it's just a day or something Like i've said a million times Don't freak out because the more you change this stuff and go changing your funnel and everything The the more steps backwards you take because the algorithm has to learn new stuff every single time So naturally i'm going to keep an eye on things but i just wanted to give you this brief update because i know You do this stuff long enough. You'll have a day like this where you're like what in the world is going on Now if this keeps happening, of course, we'll make some changes, but i'm not too worried about it Okay, that's the end of this game of should we freak out Back to our regular scheduled programming.
